type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding transformers parameter to Encoding.encode() for pre-encode text transformation

type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding return_positions param to encode() to track token start char positions

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added transformers param to Encoding.encode() signature (after disallowed_special, before closing paren) plus docstring note and application logic right after the docstring, before allowed_special handling; done and tested, safe to add your return_positions param alongside it

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added return_positions param to Encoding.encode(): appended after disallowed_special in signature, docstring note added, and after existing try/except tokens assignment added 'if not return_positions: return tokens' then uses decode_with_offsets(tokens) to compute positions; done and tested. We appear to be in separate copies of the repo so no file clobbering, but flagging param ordering in case signatures get merged later.
